You can buy a watch on Roblox for exactly 100 Robux. This EROS watch is just 70 Robux. Another watch may look just fine, and it's enough for most people. You aren't most people. You want the best. You want over 3 months of design, 250+ hours of assembly and craftsmanship like no other. Pause. This isn't just a UGC. It's a symbol. Of your status, your taste, your class! Remember that girl? Our cheapest watch looks better than your most expensive. Time for an upgrade?
